notes: Sparse stipple linework reads vaguely FAO-like, but the output reduces the photo to three generic mantle blobs with no arms, tentacles, or proper heads, failing the silhouette gate.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles entirely missing on all three figures
eyes missing or vestigial on two of three figures
no head/funnel separation from mantle — heads are absent
fins not delineated; mantle outlines are simple ovals
only three figures rendered though photo shows four-plus squid
no suckers, no hectocotylus, no arm crowns
one figure has stray scribble where eye should be (tentacle stub artifact)
stipple distribution is uniform rather than tracking the photo's chromatophore patches
silhouette is generic cephalopod mantle, not the specific Loligo pose from the photo
